creator: alexander.moskalenko@gmail.com
text:
Wowza Media Server 2 is the only proven, industrial strength, high-performance
media server that takes your H.264 content to any screen - the desktop, mobile
and the living room - for unified streaming on all popular media platforms:
    Adobe Flash
    Apple iOS: iPhone, iPad, and iPod touch
    Microsoft Silverlight
    Apple QuickTime
    Android, Blackberry and other 3GPP platforms
    Set-top boxes and more...

Wowza Media Server is the world's first unified media server that lets you
stream H.264 content simultaneously to multiple players and devices.
It unifies the three-screen H.264 streaming into a single workflow,
eliminating the need for multiple player-specific encoders and servers.

WWW: http://www.wowzamedia.com/
